detaileddescription.para: Operation mode definition, copy of from driver located at zephyr/driver/sensor/adxl372/adxl372.h

FIFO format definition, copy of from driver located at zephyr/driver/sensor/adxl372/adxl372.h

Extern declaration of function adxl372_set_op_mode, implemented by driver located at zephyr/driver/sensor/adxl372/adxl372.c

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum adxl372_fifo_mode mode, enum adxl372_fifo_format format, uint16_t fifo_samples)
memberdef.name: adxl372_configure_fifo

detaileddescription.para: Extern declaration of function adxl372_configure_fifo, implemented by driver located at zephyr/driver/sensor/adxl372/adxl372.c
Extern declaration of function adxl372_set_ext_sync, implemented by driver located at zephyr/driver/sensor/adxl372/adxl372.c

simplesect.para: (c) 2023 AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. All rights reserved.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: ADXL372 is connected to nRF9160 via SPI bus. Acceleration data will be received from driver via FIFO. If data is written from driver into FIFO callback function fifo_handler will be triggered by FIFO full interrupt. The fifo_handler retrieve the data from FIFO and inform own task via message. Data then will be send to eAdxlStore task for further processing. Adxl37x class uses functions provided by the ADXL372 driver, located at zephyr/driver/sensor/adxl372. These functions are included in this file by extern declaration.

To use these functions from the driver, the driver implementation has to be patched. The function are mentioned only for internal use in the driver and are defined as static. For use in Adxl37x class static declaration has to be removed or commented out in patch.

This source code is confidential and proprietary information of AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. You may not disclose, copy, or distribute this source code or any part thereof without the explicit permission of AXO Track GmbH, Berlin.
